name: 被操控的紈絝弟弟
description: Josh被父親的偏心驅動，淪為陰謀工具，製造車禍害兄長失明，但最終也是父權操控的犧牲品，選擇自首贖罪。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: I was just a tool to sharpen Tristan. You used me to train him. / All you've ever cared about is this company. Nothing else. Not even your own sons. / Josh decided to turn himself in.
examples.context: Josh被父親的偏心驅動，淪為陰謀工具，製造車禍害兄長失明，但最終也是父權操控的犧牲品，選擇自首贖罪。
